rationale: Educ. Code §19.005 governs eligibility for educational programs for incarcerated persons funded by the foundation school fund. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Any person confined or imprisoned in the department who is not a high school graduate is eligible for programs or services under this chapter paid for with money from the foundation school fund.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses correctional education eligibility and has no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts.
